endpoint_definitions.C1: eta-min endpoint of the AB--AC shared interface
endpoint_definitions.C2: eta-max endpoint of the AB--AC shared interface

accepted_patch_reference.provenance: ULVZ project accepted canonical two-chunk endpoint patch; reference only

limitations: Only canonical NCHUNKS=2, 90-degree by 90-degree AB central plus AC supported-left is planned.
The planner does not inspect, apply, or verify a user's SPECFEM source patch.
The planner does not run mesher, database generation, solver, Stacey, topology, or waveform acceptance.
Kim/Song exact reconstruction remains unavailable without author inputs.
